# Atezolizumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Atezolizumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Atezolizumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>21 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Atezolizumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Urothelial carcinoma&nbsp;Tecentriq as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with locally advanced or metastatic urothelial carcinoma (UC):  after prior platinum containing...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L2</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>Prostatic Urethra Urothelial Carcinoma | 99.98% | L2 | Proceed with Guardrails（99.0%）</li>
<li>Kidney Pelvis Sarcomatoid Transitional Cell Carcinoma | 99.98% | L4 | Research Question（99.0%）</li>
<li>Infiltrating Bladder Urothelial Carcinoma Sarcomatoid Variant | 99.98% | L4 | Research Question（99.0%）</li>
<li>Renal Pelvis Papillary Urothelial Carcinoma | 99.98% | L3 | Research Question（99.0%）</li>
<li>Uterine Ligament Adenocarcinoma | 99.93% | L5 | Hold（99.0%）</li>
<li>Endocervical Carcinoma | 99.92% | L2 | Proceed with Guardrails（99.0%）</li>
<li>Adenoid Cystic Carcinoma of the Cervix Uteri | 99.92% | L5 | Hold（99.0%）</li>
<li>Uterine Ligament Serous Adenocarcinoma | 99.92% | L5 | Hold（99.0%）</li>
<li>Signet Ring Cell Variant Cervical Mucinous Adenocarcinoma | 99.91% | L5 | Hold（99.0%）</li>
<li>Intestinal Variant Cervical Mucinous Adenocarcinoma | 99.91% | L5 | Hold（99.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/atezolizumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
